title: diplotaxis harra subsp. crassifolia
intro: Diplotaxis harra subsp. crassifolia, also known as wild rocket or Syrian rocket, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Diplotaxis harra subsp. crassifolia is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in cooking, adding a peppery flavor to various dishes.
